---
format: 
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
execute: 
  keep-md: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(typstable)
library(knitr)
library(typstable)

```

## Table

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'


BOD %>%
  tt() %>%  
  table_note("This is a \\ note")

# breakable(TRUE)
iris %>%
  tt()


```

Some more text.
